Interface TextSerializationAdapter

All Known Implementing Classes:
LegacyTextSerializerAdapter, YarnTextCodecsAdapter
public interface TextSerializationAdapter
Adapter for Minecraft Text serialization and deserialization. Supports different internal mechanisms (e.g., legacy Text.Serializer and modern TextCodecs).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    net.minecraft.network.chat.Component
    decode(com.google.gson.JsonElement tree, Consumer<String> onError)
    Decodes a JSON element into a Minecraft Text object.
    com.google.gson.JsonElement
    encode(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component text, net.minecraft.core.HolderLookup.Provider registries)
    Encodes a Minecraft Text object into a JSON element.
    String
    name()
    Gets the name of the adapter or the underlying mechanism.

  • Method Details

    • decode

      net.minecraft.network.chat.Component decode(com.google.gson.JsonElement tree, Consumer<String> onError)
      Decodes a JSON element into a Minecraft Text object.
      Parameters:
      tree - the JSON element to decode
      onError - a consumer to handle errors during decoding
      Returns:
      the decoded Text object, or null if input is null

    • encode

      com.google.gson.JsonElement encode(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component text, net.minecraft.core.HolderLookup.Provider registries)
      Encodes a Minecraft Text object into a JSON element.
      Parameters:
      text - the Text object to encode
      registries - the registry wrapper lookup for context-aware encoding (can be null)
      Returns:
      the encoded JSON element, or null if input is null

    • name

      String name()
      Gets the name of the adapter or the underlying mechanism.
      Returns:
      the adapter name
